page: Microsoft Azure D48ns_v6 is a network-optimized virtual machine belonging to the Dnv6 server family. It is powered by an Intel x86_64 processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance features 48 dedicated virtual CPUs and 192.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server configuration does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external volumes, though the instance is Premium Storage capable. There are no graphics processing units bundled with this instance, making it unsuitable for hardware-accelerated graphics or GPU-based machine learning workloads.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and balanced memory-to-core ratio provide predictable performance for enterprise workloads without the overhead of specialized accelerator hardware. The network-optimized design makes the D48ns_v6 well-suited for network-intensive applications, application servers, relational databases utilizing premium remote storage, and general-purpose enterprise workloads requiring high virtual core counts.
description: Microsoft Azure D48ns_v6 is a network-optimized virtual machine from the Dnv6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. Powered by an Intel x86_64 processor, it features 48 dedicated vCPUs and 192.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. This instance does not include local storage but is Premium Storage capable, relying on external storage volumes for data persistence. It contains no GPUs. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures stable, predictable performance for multi-threaded applications. Qualitatively, the D48ns_v6 offers a balanced resource profile for enterprise environments, avoiding the premium costs of specialized GPU or high-memory configurations. It is designed for network-intensive workloads, general-purpose application hosting, and database servers utilizing remote premium storage.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D48ns_v6 is a network-optimized virtual machine featuring 48 dedicated Intel x86_64 vCPUs, 192.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability without local storage or GPUs.

tagline: A network-optimized virtual machine featuring forty-eight dedicated cores and balanced memory for demanding general-purpose enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by an Intel x86_64 processor with 48 dedicated vCPUs
Equipped with 192.0 GB of system memory at a 1:4 core-to-RAM ratio
Network-optimized architecture running on Microsoft Hyper-V
Premium Storage capable with no local storage bundled
Suited for network-intensive applications and general-purpose enterprise workloads
